freedomConfigAdaptation.description: Tenant-safe display and operations values that can change without changing activation ordering, tenant isolation, or BFA validation.

keys.semantic: Plain-language stage labels shown in tenant and platform operation views.

boundedRange.rationale: Labels must remain readable in compact operation panels.

keys.semantic: Display-only estimated timing for bundle progress and support expectations.

boundedRange.rationale: Estimates tune communication only; they do not alter orchestration timeouts.

keys.semantic: Tenant-visible support destination for failed, degraded, or rollback-incomplete activation states.

boundedRange.rationale: Routing labels must remain non-secret and suitable for UI display.

grammarAdaptation.description: FLOW-00 uses the fixed G1 progress-strip grammar. Tenants may tune labels but not remove checkpoint visibility.

roleScopeAdaptation.description: Roles are fixed for certification: tenant-admin and platform-admin are executable auth roles; platform-support is UI-only until added to canonical server roles.

businessDomainAdaptation.description: Tenant-specific bundle catalog entries can be published through marketplace adaptation, but the activation safety gates remain MACHINE.

edgeCases.name: Tenant-specific bundle labels
edgeCases.semantic: Tenants can rename bundle offerings without changing required flow order or BFA checks.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: Display labels are separate from MACHINE flow identifiers.

edgeCases.name: Support escalation routing
edgeCases.semantic: Tenants can route failed activations to their chosen support channel.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: Support copy is UI-only and does not change orchestration behavior.

ironRulesMACHINE.description: Fixed invariants that tenants cannot change without breaking portability or authorization certification.
rules: CF-822: requiredFlows must not be empty.
CF-823: every required flow must exist before activation.
CF-826: DRY_RUN must run before FULL for every required flow.
CF-827: flows activate in dependency order.
CF-828: FREEDOM config defaults are additive only.
CF-829: BFA cross-flow validation checks every required flow.
CF-831: status tracking checks all bundles that include a regenerated flow.
DNA-8: storeDocument completes before enqueue for activation and status events.

tenant-a-plain-language-stage-copy.description: Tenant A makes activation stages more operationally specific for administrators.
tenant-a-plain-language-stage-copy.impact: The UI copy changes while DRY_RUN-before-FULL, dependency order, and status persistence remain unchanged.
tenant-a-plain-language-stage-copy.testable: Role screenshots show the adapted label and unit tests still enforce DRY_RUN before FULL.

notPartOfAdaptationSurface.description: MACHINE elements that must not change during tenant adaptation.
elements: Task type IDs T574, T575, and T576
